title: Money Stuff: The Podcast: Humiliation Ritual
subtitle: Money Stuff This week’s episode of the Money Stuff podcast is out now, in which Katie and I discuss Satoshi Nakamoto, spotting liars, Katie being a witc Podcast This week’s episode of the Money Stuff podcast is out now, in which Katie and I discuss Satoshi Nakamoto, spotting liars, Katie being a witch, Bill Ackman doing stuff, Universal Music Group, SPARCs, asymmetric derivatives trades, Matt’s dream money management career, doomsday funds, Elon Musk’s big thing, the SpaceX IPO, Grok for bankers, humiliating IPO pitches and some ETF stuff for the ETF fans. You can listen to this week’s episode here : You can get Money Stuff: The Podcast at Apple, Spotify or wherever you get your podcasts. We’d love your feedback. You can email us at moneypod@bloomberg.net .
